status.EXCEEDED:
You have exceed the number of available since {expiredDate}.
 You enter a 6-month grace period for "Multiscale Twin HD Navigation Token" from this date.

Please renew your token pack to keep generating optimized geometry.
status.REJECTED:
You have exceed the number of available since {expiredDate}.
 the 6-month grace period for "Multiscale Twin HD Navigation Token" is over.

Please renew your token pack to keep generating optimized geometry.
Without it, team members will now see high-quality geometry for non generated Play Rep, which may lead to longer loading times and increased memory usage.
